meaning: to be popular; to be in luck; to have good luck; to develop smoothly
sentence: 她发布的短视频一夜之间走红网络。
pinyin: Tā fābù de duǎn shìpín yī yè zhī jiān zǒu hóng wǎngluò.
english: The short video she posted went viral online overnight.

sentence: 糖尿病患者每天都需要注射胰岛素。
pinyin: Tángniàobìng huànzhě měitiān dōu xūyào zhùshè yí dǎo sù.
english: Diabetes patients need to inject insulin every day.

sentence: 今晚的篮球比赛在市中心的球馆举行。
pinyin: Jīn wǎn de lánqiú bǐsài zài shì zhōngxīn de qiú guǎn jǔxíng.
english: Tonight's basketball game is being held at the arena in the city center.

meaning: to cry out in ecstasy (during lovemaking)
sentence: 她觉得电影里那段叫床声太夸张了。
pinyin: Tā juéde diànyǐng lǐ nà duàn jiào chuáng shēng tài kuāzhāng le.
english: She thought the moaning sounds in that movie scene were way over the top.

sentence: 公民有权自由结社，组成各类团体。
pinyin: Gōngmín yǒu quán zìyóu jié shè, zǔchéng gè lèi tuántǐ.
english: Citizens have the right to freely form associations and organizations of all kinds.
